meaning: vt.璇佹槑...鏈夌姜,瀹ｅ憡...鏈夌姜n.缃姱
examples: Who said that all the men in the world should wear dull gray suits and convict haircuts?
The escaped convict was seized outside the city.
The convict was pardoned after serving five years of his sentence.
As it turned out, the emails presented by the prosecution were not enough to convict.
The emails helped the government convict Warshak on a host of fraud, conspiracy, and money-laundering charges.
